purpose: Generate a sanitized, human-readable Phase A readiness report from release readiness snapshot preview output without exposing raw payloads or enabling any real activation.
redactionRules: Do not include raw fixture bodies.
Do not include stdout/stderr from validator execution.
Do not include contact, bank, document, email, phone, WhatsApp, token, credential, attachment or signed URL values.
Do not include external provider payloads.
Keep only area, status, gate, validator id and summarized reasons.
hardStops: Do not use the sanitized report as deployment approval.
Do not remove blockers from the report unless the source validator input changed and was reviewed.
Do not publish provider-ready language while gates remain off.
Do not include raw operational or sensitive data.
